title: thermopsis mollis var. fraxinifolia
intro: Thermopsis mollis var. fraxinifolia, also known as Goldenbanner or Prairie Goldenbanner, is a perennial plant that belongs to the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood sugar levels, reducing fever, and acting as an antiseptic. Goldenbanner can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
